title: Scoring model to predict ICU stay and mortality after emergency admission in atrial fibrillation

template.name: Clinical outcomes
template.instructions: Extract the reported event rates for each outcome.

outcomes.name: ICU Admission
outcomes.description: Proportion of patients admitted to the ICU.

source: Scoring model to predict ICU stay and mortality after emergency admission in atrial fibrillation: a retrospective study. Among 30,366 patients admitted via the emergency department, in-hospital mortality occurred in 8.2% of the cohort, and 14.5% required intensive care unit (ICU) admission. The 3-day mortality rate was 3.1%.
